profile.description: Profile name to load. Defaults to 'default'. The engine loads the matching profile from the configured profile loader.

prompt.description: The user's prompt. Becomes the content of the final user message.

session.description: Session reference. If null, no session is created or continued.

context.description: Raw system-level context injected at the top of the system prompt, above profile content. The library passes these strings through untouched — it never dedupes or trims them. Use for app-layer policy (current date, environment, guardrails) or when the caller wants full control over the system prompt. Empty strings are ignored.

memory.description: Dynamic memory entries. The library deduplicates entries by stripped content (against self and against profile.memories) and, when config.max_system_chars is set, trims from the tail to fit the budget. Rendered under a '## Memory' heading after profile.memories. Empty strings are ignored.

user_context.description: Strings appended to the user turn after the prompt, joined with '\n\n'. Use for per-turn ephemeral content (RAG chunks, tool outputs, search results) that belongs with the user's question rather than the persistent system prompt. Empty strings are ignored.

images.description: Images attached to the user turn. See ImageInput for source options. Not persisted in sessions.

output.description: Output format hints. All fields default to null (no-op).

metadata.description: Arbitrary caller metadata. Passed through unchanged to PriestResponse.metadata.

SessionRef.title: SessionRef
SessionRef.description: Reference to a session to create or continue.

id.description: Session identifier. When creating a new session (create_if_missing=true), this exact ID is used — session creation is idempotent on the same ID.

continue_existing.description: If true, look up the session by ID before creating. If false, always create a new session (ID is ignored for lookup).

create_if_missing.description: Only relevant when continue_existing=true. If the session does not exist: true creates it with the provided ID; false raises SESSION_NOT_FOUND.

OutputSpec.title: OutputSpec
OutputSpec.description: Output format hints. Both fields are optional and independent.

provider_format.description: Activates provider-native structured output when supported (e.g. Ollama format field, OpenAI response_format). Currently only 'json' is defined.

prompt_format.description: Injects a natural-language format instruction into the system prompt. Works with any provider. See behavior/context-assembly.md for the exact instruction strings.

ImageInput.title: ImageInput
ImageInput.description: A single image attached to the user turn. Exactly one of `path`, `url`, or `data` must be set.

path.description: Local filesystem path. The library reads the file and base64-encodes it.

url.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL. Not supported by the Ollama provider.

media_type.description: MIME type. Used when path or data is provided; ignored for url.
